title: Senior Executive Environment Specialist
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Technical support leading as Project Manager for Metocean Studies, Water modeling and/ or monitoring, Environmental impact assessment (EIA) and Environmental management and monitoring plan (EMMP) projects.
  • Contributing to winning and leading environmental impact assessment projects and business growth in Singapore, SE Asia, and Asia (depending project opportunities) on technical aspects of one or more of the following: Coastal protection/ reclamation, Environmental Impact Assessment and Pollution Control Study. Ability to work on a combination of these services will be highly regarded.
  • Contributing to or conducting project presentations and client meetings with senior staff and Project Managers.
  • Business development support for current and prospective clients.
  • Comply with quality management on all work products.
  • Task budgeting and scheduling control.
  • Coordinating with stakeholders, sub-consultants and other disciplines, as necessary.
  • Business travels may be required.

Requirements:

  • Doctorate/ master’s degree in civil and environmental engineering, Environmental Science, Environmental Management or other related disciplines (e.g., civil engineering and environmental engineering) OR Bachelor’s degree plus equivalent years of experience in the environmental field.
  • A minimum of four years of relevant experience in EIA/ EMMP, environmental planning or environmental management, water quality modeling, environmental engineering sector. Qualified applicants will be considered for senior positions.
  • More qualified applicants may be considered for more senior lead positions.
  • Candidates with graphic skills such as Delft3D, MIKE or other water models, and other softwares/ languages such as Python, CAD, GIS, Photoshop, will be highly regarded.
  • Candidates with proven project management ability will be highly regarded.
  • Fluent spoken and written English.
  • Strong communication skills (writing, speaking, and presentation) are essential qualities to successfully work on our teams with diverse disciplines and cultures.

postedCompany.description:
We deliver total urban, infrastructure and engineering solutions to support social and economic growth.

As Asia’s consultancy powerhouse for urbanization, industrial and infrastructure developments, we have a distinguished track record in shaping Singapore’s landscape over the last 50 years.

Surbana Jurong Private Limited (SJ) provides one-stop consultancy solutions across the entire value chain of urbanisation, industrialisation and infrastructure domains.

The company offers architecture, engineering, project and construction management, urban planning, infrastructure and SMART City services. Headquartered in Singapore, SJ has a global workforce of 13,000 employees in over 95 offices across 40 countries in Asia, Australia, the Middle East, Africa and the Americas.
postedCompany.name: SURBANA JURONG CONSULTANTS PTE. LTD.
